name: telegram-channel-radar
description: Find popular Telegram channels for a user query, then set up recurring monitoring briefs.

interface.shortDescription: Find relevant Telegram channels and monitor their daily agenda.
interface.longDescription: Researches Telegram channel catalogs and public web sources for channels matching a user's topic, ranks candidates by relevance and audience signals, then helps configure recurring monitoring briefs.
defaultPrompt: Найди новостные Telegram-каналы, которые читают в Москве.
Настрой ежедневную сводку по выбранным каналам.
